reason: Successfully tested agent chat functionality: navigated to app, found agent "QA-20260721-181012-rf4g", verified status, sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?", received response "4" within 1 second.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing Gamut app with agent sidebar.
Step 2: Found agent "QA-20260721-181012-rf4g" in sidebar with status "idle" and clicked it - Agent page loaded, displaying agent settings and configuration.
Step 3: Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Agent status confirmed as "idle" at time of click, meeting the requirement.
Step 4: Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field - Message successfully typed in textbox, Send button became enabled.
Step 5: Clicked Send button to send the message - Message sent successfully, page navigated to chat session "Math Question Session", agent status changed to "working".
Step 6: Waited for agent response - Agent responded with "4" after approximately 1 second (shown as "Worked for 1s").
Step 7: Verified response mentions "4" - Response confirmed to contain "4", which is the correct answer to the mathematical question.
Step 8: Took screenshot of the conversation - Screenshot captured successfully showing the user message, agent response "4", and session details.
